svg.text: X = producer CPU group · Y = consumer CPU group · Z = API/batch mode · color = median throughput. advisory macOS affinity; no hard logical-CPU pinning
Cube cells are median aggregates when CPU count exceeds display limit. Exact directed paths: linked CSV and 2D heatmaps. Self-pairs excluded.
